parameters.query:
SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(t), '[]'::json) as result FROM (
  WITH buyer AS (
    SELECT o.user_id,
      MAX(o.created_at) AS last_purchase,
      COUNT(*) AS frequency,
      SUM(o.total_amount)/100.0 AS monetary_eur,
      EXTRACT(DAY FROM NOW() - MAX(o.created_at))::int AS recency_days
    FROM orders o
    WHERE o.status='completed' AND o.user_id IS NOT NULL 
      AND o.channel='web' AND o.total_amount > 0
    GROUP BY o.user_id
  ),
  nutaku_users AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT o.user_id
    FROM orders o
    JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id=o.id
    JOIN products p ON p.id=oi.product_id
    WHERE o.status='completed' AND o.channel='web' AND p.brand='Nutaku'
  ),
  scored AS (
    SELECT b.*,
      (nu.user_id IS NOT NULL) AS is_nutaku,
      NTILE(5) OVER (ORDER BY b.recency_days DESC) AS r,
      NTILE(5) OVER (ORDER BY b.frequency) AS f,
      NTILE(5) OVER (ORDER BY b.monetary_eur) AS m
    FROM buyer b
    LEFT JOIN nutaku_users nu ON nu.user_id = b.user_id
  ),
  segmented AS (
    SELECT *,
      CASE
        WHEN r>=4 AND f>=4 THEN 'Champions'
        WHEN r>=3 AND f>=3 THEN 'Loyal'
        WHEN r>=4 AND f<=2 THEN 'New/Recent'
        WHEN r<=2 AND f>=4 THEN 'Cannot Lose'
        WHEN r<=2 AND f>=3 THEN 'At Risk'
        WHEN r<=1 AND f<=1 THEN 'Lost'
        ELSE 'Potential'
      END AS segment
    FROM scored
  )
  SELECT segment,
    COUNT(*) AS users,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_nutaku) AS nutaku_users,
    ROUND(AVG(monetary_eur)::numeric, 2) AS avg_ltv,
    ROUND(SUM(monetary_eur)::numeric) AS gmv,
    ROUND(AVG(frequency)::numeric, 1) AS avg_orders,
    ROUND(AVG(recency_days)::numeric, 0) AS avg_silent
  FROM segmented
  GROUP BY segment
  ORDER BY gmv DESC
) t

SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(t), '[]'::json) as result FROM (
  WITH recent AS (
    SELECT o.user_id, COUNT(*) as orders_7d, SUM(o.total_amount)/100.0 as gmv_7d
    FROM orders o
    WHERE o.status='completed' AND o.channel='web' AND o.total_amount > 0
      AND o.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
    GROUP BY o.user_id
  ),
  prior AS (
    SELECT o.user_id, COUNT(*) as orders_prior
    FROM orders o
    WHERE o.status='completed' AND o.channel='web' AND o.total_amount > 0
      AND o.created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
    GROUP BY o.user_id
  )
  SELECT 
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE r.user_id IS NOT NULL AND p.user_id IS NULL) as new_buyers_7d,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE r.user_id IS NOT NULL AND p.user_id IS NOT NULL) as returning_7d,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE r.user_id IS NOT NULL) as active_7d,
    ROUND(SUM(r.gmv_7d) FILTER (WHERE r.user_id IS NOT NULL)::numeric) as gmv_7d_eur
  FROM recent r
  FULL OUTER JOIN prior p ON p.user_id = r.user_id
) t

SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(t), '[]'::json) as result FROM (
  WITH b AS (
    SELECT o.user_id,
      COUNT(*) as orders,
      SUM(o.total_amount)/100.0 as ltv,
      (NOW()::date - MAX(o.created_at)::date) as silent
    FROM orders o
    WHERE o.status='completed' AND o.user_id IS NOT NULL 
      AND o.channel='web' AND o.total_amount > 0
    GROUP BY o.user_id
  )
  SELECT 
    LEFT(u.email, 35) as email,
    u.telegram_id IS NOT NULL AS tg,
    b.orders,
    ROUND(b.ltv::numeric) as ltv,
    b.silent
  FROM b
  JOIN users u ON u.id = b.user_id
  WHERE b.ltv >= 200
    AND b.silent BETWEEN 30 AND 180
    AND b.orders >= 5
  ORDER BY b.ltv DESC
  LIMIT 10
) t
